title: Release notes and Settings page
details: New Info section on the Settings page displays a running changelog of app updates

title: Project kick-off workflow
details: Projects now have a two-phase lifecycle: draft and kicked off
New Kick Off button lets you set delivery date, sold price, and label before a project goes live
Projects track scheduledStartDate, scheduledEndDate, and kickedOffAt
Admins can reset a project back to draft via the edit modal

title: Gantt timeline views
details: New interactive Gantt chart component with collapsible sections and horizontal scroll
Clients overview now includes a timeline view showing all projects across clients
Individual client pages show a project timeline on the Projects tab

title: Clients overview table (admin)
details: Admins see a new Overview tab on the clients page with a sortable data table
Columns include status, open tasks, open projects, last activity, and next event
Reusable DataTable component with column sorting, sticky columns, and horizontal scroll

title: Service check-in timers
details: Services and client statuses now support a configurable check-in interval (days)
The overview dashboard uses the status-specific timer instead of a fixed 60-day window
Automated expiry detection creates log entries with follow-up tasks when a service timer lapses
New system event types: Follow-up and Expired service

title: Stepped modal and shared form components
details: New SteppedModal component for multi-step wizards with step indicators and fixed footer
Add Project and Edit Project now use modals instead of the right panel
ServicePills component for selecting services via pill buttons
Shared form-styles utility for consistent input/label styling across all forms

title: Project template enhancements
details: Templates now support default description, default sold price, and default delivery days
Template editor uses the new stepped modal with inline task management
Selecting a template pre-fills all project fields during creation

title: Client management improvements
details: Admins can delete clients directly from the edit form
Edit client form now passes isAdmin flag for conditional UI
Logbook entries can be linked to a service for expiry tracking
New --bg-elevated CSS variable for subtle surface differentiation
